subject: fix(icons): redesign as asymmetric graph network with 7 nodes
body:
Replace symmetric 5-node box layout with irregular 7-node graph that
reads as an actual network, not a geometric shape. Nodes at varied
positions with selective connections create organic graph topology.
Added bottom-right nodes to balance visual weight around center.
